name: Oatmeal Apple Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the shortening and white sugar until smooth.
2. Add brown sugar, eggs, vanilla, salt, soda, cinnamon, and water to the creamed mixture.
3. Stir in the oatmeal and chopped apples until combined.
4. Pour the batter into a greased square cake pan or bread pan.
5. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for one hour.
